\caption{\textbf{Main results for constituency parsing (8 shots)} We report the precision, recall and validity of the parse trees on the SynthIE-text test subset (only gold parse trees shorter than 64 tokens are used).
The width of the \textbf{confidence intervals (90\%)} are between 4.0 and 6.0 for all results except the validity of the constrained models, which is constant. The best results are in bold.}
